CHAPTER XVI1
DISEASE
You have understood by now that the planets, zodiacal
signs along with their Vargas or parts, houses and constellations
possess particular qualities, good or bad, which are revealed
in their respective periods and sub-periods. All the effects
revealed by a chart are deemed to be the results of one's Prarabdha
or past Karma that has begun to yield fruits. Hence these
fruits of Karma constitute a person's nature, tendency and
mental and physical peculiarities. However much man may
try to get over these peculiarities, he finds that his efforts are
no match for his 'nature' or destiny. For, there is a debt that
he owes to nature. In other words, man cannot fight shy of
reaping the fruits of what he had sown previously, of which,
no doubt, he is not aware at present. All relationships, good
